zh.lifeSummary: 當Echrad ingen Carlus於大約0945年出生時，她的父親Carlus Mac Ailella King of Uí Áeda Odba34歲，母親Queen of Aeda Odba Cinead Ui Morda21歲。她於大約0965年與Gilla Patraic mac Donnchad King of Ossory在愛爾蘭結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1009年在愛爾蘭享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Echrad ingen Carlus于大约0945年出生时，她的父亲Carlus Mac Ailella King of Uí Áeda Odba34岁，母亲Queen of Aeda Odba Cinead Ui Morda21岁。她于大约0965年与Gilla Patraic mac Donnchad King of Ossory在爱尔兰结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1009年在爱尔兰享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: ingen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Knut, Nels.
Norwegian: habitational name from Ringen, a common farm name in southeastern Norway, from Old Norse ringr ‘ring, circle’ describing a feature of the landscape, such as a lake.

nameMeanings.name: Carlus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Bienvenido, Blanca, Carlito, Cristina, Elva, Ernesto, Humberto, Juan Carlos, Mariana, Mariano.  French Emile, Alain, Marcel.
Catalan: from the personal name Carles, Catalan form of Charles .
French: regional variant of   Charles  ; compare 1 above.

variants.name: Charles
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Antoine, Andre, Francois, Patrice, Germaine, Magalie, Philippe, Yves, Alain, Jacques, Cecile.

French, Welsh, English, West Indian (mainly Haiti), and African (mainly Tanzania): from the French form of the ancient Germanic personal name Karl ‘man, husband, freeman’, which was Latinized as Carolus. In France the personal name was popular from an early date, due to the fame of the Emperor Charlemagne (c. 742–814; Latin name Carolus Magnus, i.e. Charles the Great). The Old French form Charles was briefly introduced to England by the Normans, but was rare during the main period of surname formation. It was introduced more successfully to Scotland in the 16th century by the Stuarts, who had strong ties with France, and was brought by them to England in the 17th century. Its frequency as a Welsh surname is attributable to the late date of Welsh surname formation. Old English Ceorl ‘peasant’ is also found as a byname, but the resulting Middle English form, Charl, with a patronymic in -s, if it existed at all, would have been absorbed by the French form introduced by the Normans. English variants pronounced with initial k- for the most part reflect the cognate Old Norse personal name Karl, Karli. Compare Carl .

English: in some cases, possibly a habitational name from Charles (Devon), or a post-medieval variant of Cherrill, with excrescent -s, perhaps by false association with the personal name Charles. Cherrill is either a habitational name from Cherhill in Wilshire, or a status name from Middle English cherl, cheril, charl, chirl ‘churl, bonded tenant, serf; peasant’.

nameMeanings.name: Echrad
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Schrade
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Frieda, Hans, Katharina.
North German: nickname for a skinny person, from Middle Low German schrade ‘thin, wretched, scrawny’ (see also Schrage ).

en.lifeSummary: When Echrad ingen Carlus was born about 0945, her father, Carlus Mac Ailella King of Uí Áeda Odba, was 34 and her mother, Queen of Aeda Odba Cinead Ui Morda, was 21. She married Gilla Patraic mac Donnchad King of Ossory about 0965, in Ireland. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1009, in Ireland, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Echrad ingen Carlus est née environ 0945, son père, Carlus Mac Ailella King of Uí Áeda Odba, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Queen of Aeda Odba Cinead Ui Morda, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Gilla Patraic mac Donnchad King of Ossory environ 0965, à Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1009, à Irlande, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Echrad ingen Carlus um 0945 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Carlus Mac Ailella King of Uí Áeda Odba 34 und ihre Mutter Queen of Aeda Odba Cinead Ui Morda 21. Sie hat um 0965 in Irland Gilla Patraic mac Donnchad King of Ossory geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1009 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Echrad ingen Carlus è nata il circa 0945, sua padre, Carlus Mac Ailella King of Uí Áeda Odba, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Queen of Aeda Odba Cinead Ui Morda, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Gilla Patraic mac Donnchad King of Ossory circa 0965, nel Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1009, nel Irlanda, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Echrad ingen Carlusが約0945年に生まれた時，父Carlus Mac Ailella King of Uí Áeda Odbaは34歳，母Queen of Aeda Odba Cinead Ui Mordaは21歳であった。約0965年にアイルランドでGilla Patraic mac Donnchad King of Ossoryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1009年にアイルランドで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Echrad ingen Carlus(이)가 대략 0945년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Carlus Mac Ailella King of Uí Áeda Odba(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Queen of Aeda Odba Cinead Ui Morda(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 0965년 아일랜드에서 Gilla Patraic mac Donnchad King of Ossory(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1009년 아일랜드에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Echrad ingen Carlus nasceu aproximadamente 0945, seu pai, Carlus Mac Ailella King of Uí Áeda Odba, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Queen of Aeda Odba Cinead Ui Morda, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Gilla Patraic mac Donnchad King of Ossory aproximadamente 0965, em Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1009, em Irlanda, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Echrad ingen Carlus родилась около 0945 г., её отцу по имени Carlus Mac Ailella King of Uí Áeda Odba было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Queen of Aeda Odba Cinead Ui Morda, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gilla Patraic mac Donnchad King of Ossory около 0965 г. в местности Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1009 г. в местности Ирландия в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Echrad ingen Carlus nació aproximadamente 0945, su papá, Carlus Mac Ailella King of Uí Áeda Odba, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Queen of Aeda Odba Cinead Ui Morda, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Gilla Patraic mac Donnchad King of Ossory aproximadamente 0965, en Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1009, en Irlanda, a la edad de 65 años.
